brand.name: EthioMLS
brand.tagline: ኣብ ኢትዮጵያ ገዛውንቲን ንግዳዊ ቦታታትን ርከቡ

home.lede: ኣብ ኣዲስ ኣበባ ዝተረጋገጹ ኣባይቲ፣ ኣብ ህንጻ ዘለዉ ፕሮጀክትታትን ንግዳዊ ቦታታትን — ብኣርባዕተ ቋንቋታት።

filters.title: መጣረያታት
filters.searchPlaceholder: ብቦታ፣ ፕሮጀክት ወይ ቁልፊ ቃል ድለዩ

compliance.escrowBody: ናይ ዓደቅቲ ዕችር ገንዘብ ኣብ ዝተቈጸለ ናይ ባንክ ሕሳብ ይሕዝ፤ ብኣዋጅ ቁጽሪ 1357/2016 ኣብ ዝተረጋገጹ ደረጃታት ህንጻ ይፍተሕ።
compliance.foreignClearanceBody: ናይ ጉኖት ዔጋታት መንበሪ ገዛ ዕድጊ ብኣዋጅ ቁጽሪ 1388/2017 ሕግታት ፍቃድን ወፍሪን ይክተል።
compliance.offPlanWarningBody: ናይ ኣራጋጺ ክፍልታት ንዚ ቅድሚ ውጥን ንብረት ኣብ ዕጹው ናይ ባንክ ኤስክሮው ሕሳብ ተቈፊሉ ኣሎ። ገንዘብ ዝፍተሕ ድሕሪ ዝተረጋገጹ ደረጃታት ህንጻ ጥራይ እዩ (ኣዋጅ 1357/2016)።

search.title: ዝደልዩዎ ንገሩና
search.lede: ሰለስተ ኣጽቃጢ ሕቶታት መልሱ። በጀትኩም ብናይ እዋን NBE ተመን ኣብ ETBን USDን ይመጣጠን።

prompts.cluster: ኣየናይ ክፍለ ከተማ ኣዲስ ኣበባ ትመርጹ?

ai.lede: ዝደልዩዎ ብቀሊል ቋንቋ ግለጹ — ዕላማ፣ ከባቢን በጀትን ክምላእ ንገብር።
ai.placeholder: ኣብነት፦ ኣብ ቦሌ 2 መደቀሲ ብወርሒ ካብ 80,000 ብር ትሕቲ ንኪራይ
ai.error: እቲ ድለይ ክረድእ ኣይከኣለን። ኣብ ታሕቲ ዘለዉ ስጉምትታት ፈትኑ።

search.simpleLede: ዕላማ፣ ከባቢን በጀትን ምረጹ — ድሕሪኡ ተመሳሳሊ ኣባይቲ ረኣዩ።

completion.hint: Filters off-plan units and projects by verified construction progress.

building.scrollHint: እቲ ክምር ስክሮል ግበሩ ወይ ደረጃ ጠውቁ

listings.title: ዝርዝራት
listings.lede: ኣብ አዲስ ኣበባ ንጡፋት ኣባይቲን ንግዳዊ ቦታታትን ረኣዩ።

projects.title: ፕሮጀክታት
projects.lede: ኦፍ-ፕላንን ኣብ ህንጻ ዘለው ፕሮጀክታት ብኤስክሮ ደረጃ ርእዮ።
projects.selectUnit: Inspect a floor, then select a unit to see MLS ID and property details.

developers.title: ኣራጋጽቲ
developers.lede: ኣብ EthioMLS ዝተረጋገጹ ኮርፖሬት ኣራጋጽትን ደላላን ምርምር።

inventory.heading: ናይ ኣሃዱ ክምችት
inventory.lede: ፕሮጀክታትን ህንጻታትን ብዓይነት ኣሃዱ ተኸፋፊሎም፣ ምስ ቁጽሪ ርክበት።

pages.comingOnline: ዝርዝር ኣብ መስመር ይመጽእ ኣሎ — ናሙና ኣብ ታሕቲ።
pages.emptyHint: ምሉእ ካታሎግ PostgreSQL ዳታቤዝ ምስ ተተሓሓዘ ይርከብ።
pages.emptyDirectory: ዝተለገቡ መዝገባት የለን። ናይ ምርኢት ክምችት ንምምላእ `npx prisma db seed` ገይርኩም።

consent.title: ምስ ደላላ ንምርካብ ፍቓድ
consent.body: ቁጽሪ ስልኪ ደላላ ንብሕታዊነት ተሸፊኑ። ንዚ ዝርዝር ጥራይ lead ንምፍጣርን መስመር ንምኽፋትን Consent Gate ኣረጋግጹ።
consent.checkbox: ሕቶይ ንምክፋልን ናይዚ ዝርዝር መርትዖ ደላላ ንምቕባልን ይሰማማዕ እየ።
consent.mustTick: ንምቕጻል ናይ Consent Gate ሳጹን ምልክት ግበሩ።

auth.title: ናብ EthioMLS እቶ
auth.lede: ብስልኪ ቁጽርን መሕለፊ ቃልን እቶ። መረጋገጺ SMS ኣብ ሓድሽ መሳርሒ ጥራይ የድሊ። ኢመይል ኣብ መገለጺኻ ድሒርካ ክትውስኽ ትኽእል።
auth.phoneHint: ናይ ከባቢ ቁጽርታት ጥራይ (+251 9… / +251 7…)። ዓለምለኻዊ ኣይቅበሉን።
auth.newDeviceHint: ሓድሽ መሳርሒ — ንምእታው ናይ SMS ኮድ ኣእቱ። እሙናት መሳርሒታት ዝቕጽል ግዜ ነዚ ይሓልፉ።
auth.mockHint: SMS ኣብ mock ሁነታ እዩ — ኣብ ታሕቲ ዘሎ ኮድ ተጠቐም።

password.label: መሕለፊ ቃል
password.hint: እንተወሓደ 8 ፊደላት። ናይ SMS ኮድ ኣብ ሓድሽ መሳርሒ ጥራይ።
password.tooShort: መሕለፊ ቃል እንተወሓደ 8 ፊደላት ክኸውን ኣለዎ።

role.label: ተራኻ
role.hint: ንዚ ሕሳብ ሓደ ተራ ምረጽ። ድሒርካ ክትቕይሮ ኣይትኽእልን።
role.required: ናይ ሕሳብ ንምፍጣር ሓደ ተራ ምረጽ።
role.locked: ተራኻ ኣብ ምዝገባ ተቐሚጡ እዩ — ክቕየር ኣይክእልን።
role.ownerHint: ናትካ ገዛ ንመሸጣ ወይ ኪራይ መዝግብ።

profile.title: መገለጺኻ
profile.lede: ናይ ኢትዮጵያ ስልኪ ቁጽርኻ መእተውኻ እዩ። ኢመይል ኣማራጺ እዩ።
profile.phoneLocked: ስልኪ መለለዪ መእተውኻ እዩ፤ ኣብዚ ኣይቀየርን።

dashboard.title: ናይ ዕዳጋ ዴስክ
dashboard.lede: ናይ ኣዲስ ኣበባ ክምችት፣ መስርሕ ግምገማን ሽፋን ትርጉም Geminiን።

imports.title: Import sources
imports.lede: Add public Telegram channels, Facebook Pages, or websites. Scraped posts become pending listings with contact numbers for admin audit before publication. East-corridor off-plan sources (Ayat, Temer, brokers) can be seeded and bulk-run with npm run scrape:offplan-ads.
imports.addLede: Paste a Telegram handle (e.g. @gechocommission8), a Facebook Page URL (facebook.com/YourPage), or a website URL. Tag east-corridor off-plan sources with notes containing east-offplan.
imports.label: Label (optional)
imports.notesPlaceholder: east-offplan · broker channel — audit contacts carefully
imports.cliHint: Bulk seed + scrape Ayat / Temer / east brokers: npm run scrape:offplan-ads
imports.empty: No sources yet. Add a Telegram channel, Facebook Page, or website above.

rolesIndex.title: Choose your role
rolesIndex.lede: Client, broker, owner, developer, or admin — each hub highlights the tools you need.

client.title: Find your next home
client.lede: Browse verified listings and projects. Sign in to unlock contact numbers, visits, and 360° tours.

broker.title: List and manage inventory
broker.lede: Publish properties for clients, keep contacts ready for admin audit, and track the market from one place.

owner.title: Sell or rent your property
owner.lede: List your own home with photos and documents. Every submission waits for admin audit before it goes live.

developer.title: Showcase projects and off-plan units
developer.lede: Publish escrow-backed off-plan inventory with the full document pack, unit photos, and Fayda verify for your company rep.

admin.title: Audit and import the market
admin.lede: Scrape Telegram and websites, review pending listings, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.

developer.title: Publish escrow-backed inventory
developer.lede: Track readiness, submit the full document pack, and follow units through admin review from one place.
developer.readinessProfileNeeded: No developer profile yet — trade name and registration are collected on first inventory submit.
developer.readinessFaydaOk: Fayda eSignet verified for your account
developer.readinessFaydaNeeded: Fayda verify still needed (demo verify on the inventory form until RP credentials are live)
developer.packLede: Every unfinished unit needs org docs, floor plan, title or lease, MUD permit, escrow letter, photos, and Fayda — AI can prefill fields from uploads.
developer.packFayda: Fayda eSignet for the company representative
developer.pendingEmpty: No listings waiting for audit. Submit off-plan inventory to get started.
developer.publishedEmpty: Nothing published yet — approved inventory will appear here.

admin.title: Review, audit, and publish
admin.lede: Work the pending queue, clear collision alerts, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.
admin.checklistLede: Every approval must pass identity, ownership, price, location, media, permit, escrow, contact, and fraud screens.
admin.readyEmpty: Nothing audited yet — approve a pending listing to see it here.

adminAudit.title: Client-protection audit
adminAudit.lede: Complete every check and add notes before approving. Approval does not publish — use Publish after audit passes.
adminAudit.approvedReady: Audit passed — you can publish this listing.

listingDetail.noPhone: No phone on file — admin will add one after audit.
listingDetail.signUpForContact: Sign up with your Ethiopian mobile number to see the contact phone and request a visit.
listingDetail.signUpForTour: Create a free account to open the 360° virtual tour.
